title: Typed Failure Recovery in Neuro-Symbolic Text-to-FOL Pipelines
summary: Generated a 14-page publication-ready LaTeX paper targeting ACL/EMNLP. Sections written: Abstract, Introduction (Problem Definition, Why Hard, Why Unsolved, Contributions, Summary), Related Work (5 subsections), Methods (Typed Failure Detection Types 1-4, Type-Specific Repair Strategies, Span-Attributed Proof Construction, Bridge-Axiom Library), Experiments (Datasets, Setup, Metrics, Results with accuracy/hallucination/ablation tables), Discussion (Interpretation, Limitations, Prior Work Comparison, Future Work), Conclusion, References. Both figures included: fig1_v0.jpg (21:9 pipeline architecture diagram, figure* full-width on page 4) and fig2_v0.jpg (21:9 accuracy comparison bar chart, figure* full-width on page 9). Bibliography built via aii_semscholar_bib__fetch with 15 verified BibTeX entries (Logic-LM/Pan2023, SWI-Prolog, ARGOS/Cotnareanu2026, NLProlog/Weber2019, Cornelio2024, Brassard2024/scope, FOLIO/Han2022, Khashabi2021, Thawani2020, DeepProbLog/Manhaeve2018, Hao2022, ProofWriter/Tafjord2021, CLUTRR/Sinha2019, SentBERT/Reimers2019, Wikidata/Vrandecic2014). Compiled successfully with pdflatex/bibtex/pdflatex/pdflatex (4-pass). Visual review of all 14 pages confirmed: clean layout, no overlapping elements, all figures render correctly, all citations resolve, ablation and threshold-sensitivity tables formatted with booktabs.
